hero.title: Finally understand official letters without fear
hero.subtitle: Analyze, understand and respond to your official correspondence in Germany with AI

demo.aiExplanationText: Your Bürgergeld application was rejected because missing documents were not submitted on time. You have 14 days to file an appeal.
demo.securityNote: End-to-end encrypted · GDPR compliant · Your data stays private

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: GovMate AI is an AI assistant designed for immigrants who struggle to understand official letters from German authorities. It analyzes your letters, explains them in simple language, and generates professional reply letters.
faq.q2: What types of documents can I upload?
faq.a2: You can upload documents in PDF, JPG, PNG, WEBP, and TXT formats. You can also simply take a photo of the official letter and upload it.
faq.a3: Yes, all your data is encrypted and stored securely. We are GDPR compliant and do not share your data with third parties.
faq.q4: How sufficient is the free plan?
faq.a4: With the free plan, you can analyze 20 documents per month and create 2 reply letters. For more, you can upgrade to the Pro or Business plan.
faq.a5: No, GovMate AI does not provide legal advice. Generated letters are drafts. For important legal matters, always consult a lawyer.

landing.disclaimer: This app does not provide legal advice. For official decisions, please consult an expert or the relevant authority.

privacyPage.subtitle: Privacy Policy
privacyPage.s1Text: GovMate AI is a digital assistant service that helps immigrants in Germany understand official documents. The service does not provide legal advice.
privacyPage.s2Account: Account Data: Email address, name, preferred language, city (optional), country of origin (optional)
privacyPage.s2Documents: Uploaded Documents: PDF files, images and text files you upload for analysis
privacyPage.s2Usage: Usage Data: Number of analyses, created letters, deadlines
privacyPage.s2Technical: Technical Data: IP address, browser type, access times (for security logs)
privacyPage.s4Text: Your data is securely stored on Supabase Inc. servers. All data transfers are encrypted (TLS/SSL). Documents are protected with Row Level Security – only you can access your own documents.
privacyPage.s5Text: Uploaded documents are sent to OpenAI for analysis. OpenAI processes the data according to their own privacy policy. We only send the necessary text for analysis.
privacyPage.s6Access: Access: You can request a copy of your data at any time
privacyPage.s6Correct: Rectification: You can update your personal data
privacyPage.s6Delete: Deletion: You can delete your account and all associated data
privacyPage.s6Export: Data Portability: You can export your data as a PDF file
privacyPage.s6Object: Objection: You can object to the processing of your data

termsPage.subtitle: Terms of Service
termsPage.s1Text: GovMate AI is an AI-powered document assistant that helps immigrants in Germany understand official letters and compose responses. The service does NOT provide legal advice.
s2Items: You must be at least 18 years old
You are responsible for the accuracy of uploaded documents
You may not use the service for illegal purposes
You may not upload forged documents
termsPage.s3Text: GovMate AI does NOT provide legal advice. AI-generated explanations and letter drafts are for informational purposes only. For binding legal information, consult a lawyer or the relevant authority.
termsPage.s4Free: Free Plan: Limited usage without payment
termsPage.s4Pro: Pro/Business Plans: Monthly billing via Stripe
termsPage.s4Cancel: Cancel anytime at the end of the current period
termsPage.s5Text: You may freely use letters and explanations generated by GovMate AI. Intellectual property rights to the platform itself remain with GovMate AI.
termsPage.s6Text: Your data is processed in accordance with our privacy policy and in compliance with the GDPR.
termsPage.s7Text: We reserve the right to change these terms at any time. Significant changes will be communicated by email.

disclaimerPage.subtitle: Legal Notice
disclaimerPage.mainWarning: GovMate AI does NOT provide legal advice.
disclaimerPage.mainWarningDetail: All explanations, letter drafts and recommendations are for informational purposes only. For legally binding information, please consult a lawyer, advisory center or the relevant authority.
disclaimerPage.s1Text: GovMate AI is an AI-based information service. The generated explanations and letter templates do not replace professional legal advice. The AI can make mistakes and may misinterpret official documents.
disclaimerPage.s2Text: Although we strive to provide accurate and helpful information, we cannot guarantee the accuracy, completeness or timeliness of AI-generated content.
disclaimerPage.s3Text: Deadlines detected by the AI serve only as guidance. Always verify all deadlines against the original document. GovMate AI is not liable for missed deadlines.
disclaimerPage.s4Text: Generated letter drafts are suggestions and should be reviewed and adjusted before sending. We strongly recommend seeking professional help, especially for appeals.
disclaimerPage.s6Text: For questions or concerns, contact us:
